data.body: WS3 implemented + committed (Change-Id Id6cf431, stacked on WS2). fsck _scan prints informational 'ensures: N/M applied' (text-only, excluded from --output json, no issue_count impact); fsck --repair folds run_ensures as a distinct phase (own write lock, log-and-continue, dry-run/no_mutate never sweep); mcp_server.main runs a best-effort short-lock (timeout=5,attempts=1) run_ensures after --help and before build_server().run(), never aborting boot; run_ensures gained an optional timeout/attempts passthrough. tests/interfaces/store/test_fsck_ensures.py (10 tests) green. make lint + typecheck + env-registry gate green; store+fsck+cli+library regression (196 passed) green. Not closing until Gerrit Verified +1.
